required_preferences.fact: Uses rideshare or accepts help from family/friends for all work commutes during ankle fracture recovery — strictly avoids walking or driving himself

supersedes.fact: Drives or uses rideshare to work while recovering from severe back pain; avoids walking until cleared by physician

required_preferences.fact: Regularly spends time caring for his father at home throughout the week; no longer restricts interactions to Saturday visits

supersedes.fact: Visits his father every Saturday afternoon; never cancels even for work obligations

required_preferences.fact: Prepares detailed audit binders and organizes supporting documents nightly at home, outside office hours, to ensure readiness for IRS interviews
Avoids scheduling or attending non-essential meetings (including board game nights) during audit window; declines invitations in favor of audit tasks
Initiates nightly video calls with his spouse on weekdays to maintain connection while she is away
Completes daily physical therapy exercises as instructed; prioritizes recovery activities in his routine

persona: A senior accountant at a nonprofit organization with limited staff
